name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝙁𝙪𝙘𝙠... 𝙮𝙤𝙪'𝙧𝙚 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 𝙝𝙤𝙢𝙚."  |
where a freshly-showered Gojo misses you, his partner.


_____________



I got into Sam and Colby (paranormal youtubers) back when they uploaded their conjuring house series. And when that Cody and Satori alphabet method of communicating with spirits came out I literally truly turned into a believer.

I am so gullible I feel like I got scammed and I didn't even pay anything 😭

I just watched John Wolfe's 2 videos on the series and I am so grateful for debunkers. I am a science girl and even I believe these things 😭

regardless... i am still a devoted Colby girl for life. That man is SO fine like I just cannot stop looking at him... and his shirtless instagram photos 🤭

Also, is anyone else obsessed with just watching video essays?? its so therapeutic to see people analyse things properly (e.g., salem is one of my favourite video essay youtubers 🙏🏼)
